overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person perspective from inside a futuristic flying vehicle navigating through the high-rise city of Night City. The vehicle accelerates from an enclosed structure through urban canyons with glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, and neon advertisements, maintaining high speed throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway emerging from enclosed structure

events.description: exits enclosed metal structure into open cityscape with glass skyscrapers
vehicle accelerates to high cruising speed

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic hovercar through the city, accelerating from an enclosed garage into open air between skyscrapers

entered.detail: rusted metal mesh walls of the starting enclosure
tall futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside an enclosed structure with metal grating walls, then emerges into the open air of a futuristic city. The vehicle accelerates along an elevated highway surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with luxury retail buildings

events.description: vehicle makes a left turn around the JINGUJI building
enters narrower corridor between high-rise buildings with reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating through the city center, passing the prominent JINGUJI luxury building and turning into a narrower urban canyon

entered.detail: luxury retail building with large illuminated signage
building with distinctive wooden slat exterior design

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the open city, passing the prominent JINGUJI building on the left before turning into a narrower corridor between skyscrapers. The lighting shifts as the vehicle enters a more enclosed urban canyon with a distinctive wooden-slatted building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor with massive digital advertising displays

events.description: passing large digital billboards creates fluctuating colored light patterns inside the cabin
exits the narrowest corridor into slightly more open area with visible sky

agents.ego_description: speeding through a narrow urban canyon lined with large digital billboards and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
floating holographic displays with neon colors and product imagery

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow corridor between tall buildings, the vehicle passes large digital billboards and colorful holographic advertisements that illuminate the enclosed space. The environment is darker and more enclosed than previous sections, with artificial lighting from screens dominating the visual field.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated approach to destination with street level visible

events.description: vehicle begins to slow down significantly as it approaches the destination
approaches street level ramp or landing zone with view of ground level

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching the final destination, navigating the elevated roadway with street level visible below

entered.detail: descending ramp leading toward ground level street
landing area with structural supports and platform visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates as it approaches its destination, moving through a slightly more open area with views of the street level below. The journey concludes as the vehicle nears the landing zone or parking area, transitioning from the high-speed corridor to the destination ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed flight that transitions from a confined industrial interior into the expansive, sunlit canyons of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within an enclosed structure defined by metal grating walls before bursting into the open air of a city under clear morning skies. As the vehicle accelerates along an elevated highway, the view opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and the prominent JINGUJI building. The scene then shifts as the camera steers away from the open skyline and dives into a narrower urban corridor. Finally, the lighting dims and the environment becomes more enclosed as the vehicle glides past a distinctive wooden-slatted building facade.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic urban canyon that gradually opens up as the vehicle reaches its destination. It begins by speeding through a narrow corridor between towering skyscrapers, where the dark environment is illuminated by the vivid glow of large digital billboards and holographic advertisements. As the vehicle maintains its course, the enclosed space begins to expand, revealing glimpses of the street level far below. The scene then shifts as the vehicle decelerates, transitioning from the high-speed flight path toward a landing zone. Finally, the camera glides smoothly away from the neon-lit heights and onto a destination ramp to conclude the journey.
